summary: The diff shows that DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx was modified with hardcoded JSX for table cards, PK/FK badges, field listings, and a responsive grid layout using Tailwind CSS. The file is truncated so complete verification of all 10 tables is not possible, but the visible content aligns with REQ-71 requirements including the Users table with PK/FK badges, no .map(), no hooks, and Medical Blue theme styling. The truncation prevents full confirmation of all 10 tables being present.
